args.query: SELECT business_ref, AVG(rating) AS avg_rating, COUNT(*) AS review_count FROM review GROUP BY business_ref;

exec_args.sql: SELECT business_ref, AVG(rating) AS avg_rating, COUNT(*) AS review_count FROM review GROUP BY business_ref;

result.preview: "Pennsylvania (PA) \u2014 8 businesses offering WiFi; average rating for those businesses \u2248 3.484 (weighted by review counts)."

args.answer: Pennsylvania (PA) — 8 businesses offering WiFi; average rating for those businesses ≈ 3.484 (weighted by review counts).
